report.title: 考核业绩汇总表

select.value:
select gw.EMP_ID ,%SQLExamCol% as MEASURE_DT ,gw.EMP_NM ,gw.ORG_ID ,gw.ORG_NM ,gw.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,gw.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,gw.HEAD_ORG_ID ,gw.PSTN_TYPE ,gw.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,gw.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,gw.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,(coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')||coalesce(ce.GRADE,'')) as GRADE ,coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'') as ZY_FLAG ,(case when gd.EMP_TYPE='过渡期' then '是' else '' end) as EMP_GDQ ,gw.EMP_POS ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 else coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0) end) as DEP_Q_PROFIT ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else coalesce(sy.LN_Q_PROFIT,0) end) as LN_Q_PROFIT ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else coalesce(sy.LN_Q_PROFIT_ext,0) end) as LN_Q_PROFIT_ext ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else coalesce(sy.LN_Q_PROFIT_new,0) end) as LN_Q_PROFIT_new ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else coalesce(mid.INCOME,0) end) as INCOME ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else tz.TZ_PROF_SUM end) as TZ_PROF_SUM ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else (coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)+coalesce(sy.LN_Q_PROFIT,0)+coalesce(mid.INCOME,0)+coalesce(tz.TZ_PROF_SUM,0)) end) as PROFIT_SUM from ( select distinct EMP_ID ,EMP_NM ,ORG_ID ,ORG_NM ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,BRANCH_ORG_NM ,HEAD_ORG_ID ,PSTN_TYPE ,PSTN_TYPE_NM ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,EMP_TYPE as EMP_POS from IBS.T5_EMP_BZJX bz %INNERSQL% where {#condition#} %SQL% ) gw left join ( select pf.EMP_ID, (case when rs.EMP_ID is not null then '是' else '' end) as ZY_FLAG, sum(case when rs.EMP_ID is not null and coalesce(rs.DEP_QTD_PROFIT_SJ,0)>0 then coalesce(rs.DEP_QTD_PROFIT_SJ,0) when rs.EMP_ID is not null and coalesce(rs.DEP_QTD_PROFIT_SJ,0)<=0 then 0 else DEP_Q_PROFIT end) as DEP_Q_PROFIT, sum(LN_Q_PROFIT) as LN_Q_PROFIT, sum(case when NEW_OR_EXIST='存量' then coalesce(LN_Q_PROFIT,0) else 0 end)as LN_Q_PROFIT_ext, sum(case when NEW_OR_EXIST='新增' then coalesce(LN_Q_PROFIT,0) else 0 end) as LN_Q_PROFIT_new from IBS.T2_EMP_DEP_LN_PROFIT_SMY pf inner join ibs.T99_MIDDLE_INCOME_SWITCH sw on sw.MEASURE_DT=pf.MEASURE_DT and sw.MEASURE_DT like {#MEASURE_YEAR#}||'%' %SQLExamQ% left join IBS.T3_RESOURCE_MANAGER_SMY rs on rs.MEASURE_DT=pf.MEASURE_DT and rs.EMP_ID=pf.EMP_ID where PSTN_TYPE='04' and pf.EMP_ID not like '1%' group by pf.EMP_ID,(case when rs.EMP_ID is not null then '是' else '' end) )sy on sy.EMP_ID=gw.EMP_ID left join ( select EMP_ID , sum(INCOME) as INCOME from ibs.T1_MIDDLE_BUSINESS_INCOME sw where sw.MEASURE_DT like {#MEASURE_YEAR#}||'%' %SQLExamQ% group by EMP_ID )mid on mid.EMP_ID=gw.EMP_ID left join ibs.T5_EMP_CERTIFICATE ce on ce.EMP_ID=gw.EMP_ID left join ibs.T5_EMP_GDQ_OR_GZ gd on gw.EMP_ID=gd.EMP_ID and gd.STATUS='1' and gd.MEASURE_DT like {#MEASURE_YEAR#}||'%' %SQLExamQgd% left join( select EMP_ID, sum(BL_QTD_PROFIT_OLD-BL_QTD_PROFIT+BILL_INC+OTHER_PROFIT) as TZ_PROF_SUM from ibs.T2_EMP_LN_BL_X_BILL_V where CHG_DT like {#MEASURE_YEAR#}||'%' %SQLExamQtz% group by EMP_ID ) tz on tz.EMP_ID=gw.EMP_ID
order by gw.HEAD_ORG_ID,gw.BRANCH_ORG_ID,gw.ORG_ID,gw.EMP_ID

option.source: @{select QTD , QTD_NM , QTD_CD from ibs.T9_YEAR_Q order by QTD }
option.label: QTD_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct PSTN_TYPE , PSTN_TYPE_NM from ibs.T9_PSTN_TYPE where PSTN_TYPE='04' order by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM }
option.label: PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{select distinct SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM from ibs.T9_PSTN_TYPE where PSTN_TYPE='#PSTN_TYPE#' order by SUB_PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID,BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2','3') and (ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID, ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2') and BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID1#' and (HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY ORG_ID}
option.label: ORG_NM

report.footer: 提示:本系统币种为本外币合计

report.title: 我的考核业绩汇总表

select.value: select gw.EMP_ID ,%SQLExamCol% as MEASURE_DT ,gw.EMP_NM ,gw.ORG_ID ,gw.ORG_NM ,gw.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,gw.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,gw.HEAD_ORG_ID ,gw.PSTN_TYPE ,gw.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,gw.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,gw.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,(coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')||coalesce(ce.GRADE,'')) as GRADE ,coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'') as ZY_FLAG ,(case when gd.EMP_TYPE='过渡期' then '是' else '' end) as EMP_GDQ ,gw.EMP_POS ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 else coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0) end) as DEP_Q_PROFIT ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else coalesce(sy.LN_Q_PROFIT,0) end) as LN_Q_PROFIT ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else coalesce(sy.LN_Q_PROFIT_ext,0) end) as LN_Q_PROFIT_ext ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else coalesce(sy.LN_Q_PROFIT_new,0) end) as LN_Q_PROFIT_new ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else coalesce(mid.INCOME,0) end) as INCOME ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else tz.TZ_PROF_SUM end) as TZ_PROF_SUM ,(case when coalesce(ce.YEAR,'')='' and coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='' then 0 when coalesce(sy.ZY_FLAG,'')='是' and coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)<=0 then 0 else (coalesce(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)+coalesce(sy.LN_Q_PROFIT,0)+coalesce(mid.INCOME,0)+coalesce(tz.TZ_PROF_SUM,0)) end) as PROFIT_SUM from ( select distinct EMP_ID ,EMP_NM ,ORG_ID ,ORG_NM ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,BRANCH_ORG_NM ,HEAD_ORG_ID ,PSTN_TYPE ,PSTN_TYPE_NM ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,EMP_TYPE as EMP_POS from IBS.T5_EMP_BZJX bz %INNERSQL% where {#condition#} ) gw left join ( select pf.EMP_ID, (case when rs.EMP_ID is not null then '是' else '' end) as ZY_FLAG, sum(case when rs.EMP_ID is not null and coalesce(rs.DEP_QTD_PROFIT_SJ,0)>0 then coalesce(rs.DEP_QTD_PROFIT_SJ,0) when rs.EMP_ID is not null and coalesce(rs.DEP_QTD_PROFIT_SJ,0)<=0 then 0 else DEP_Q_PROFIT end) as DEP_Q_PROFIT, sum(LN_Q_PROFIT) as LN_Q_PROFIT, sum(case when NEW_OR_EXIST='存量' then coalesce(LN_Q_PROFIT,0) else 0 end)as LN_Q_PROFIT_ext, sum(case when NEW_OR_EXIST='新增' then coalesce(LN_Q_PROFIT,0) else 0 end) as LN_Q_PROFIT_new from IBS.T2_EMP_DEP_LN_PROFIT_SMY pf inner join ibs.T99_MIDDLE_INCOME_SWITCH sw on sw.MEASURE_DT=pf.MEASURE_DT and sw.MEASURE_DT like {#MEASURE_YEAR#}||'%' %SQLExamQ% left join IBS.T3_RESOURCE_MANAGER_SMY rs on rs.MEASURE_DT=pf.MEASURE_DT and rs.EMP_ID=pf.EMP_ID where PSTN_TYPE='04' and pf.EMP_ID not like '1%' group by pf.EMP_ID,rs.EMP_ID )sy on sy.EMP_ID=gw.EMP_ID left join ( select EMP_ID , sum(INCOME) as INCOME from ibs.T1_MIDDLE_BUSINESS_INCOME sw where sw.MEASURE_DT like {#MEASURE_YEAR#}||'%' %SQLExamQ% group by EMP_ID )mid on mid.EMP_ID=gw.EMP_ID left join ibs.T5_EMP_CERTIFICATE ce on ce.EMP_ID=gw.EMP_ID left join ibs.T5_EMP_GDQ_OR_GZ gd on gw.EMP_ID=gd.EMP_ID and gd.STATUS='1' and gd.MEASURE_DT like {#MEASURE_YEAR#}||'%' %SQLExamQgd% left join( select EMP_ID, sum(BL_QTD_PROFIT_OLD-BL_QTD_PROFIT+BILL_INC+OTHER_PROFIT) as TZ_PROF_SUM from ibs.T2_EMP_LN_BL_X_BILL_V where CHG_DT like {#MEASURE_YEAR#}||'%' %SQLExamQtz% group by EMP_ID ) tz on tz.EMP_ID=gw.EMP_ID left join IBS.T5_EMP_ASSESSMENT_Q zy on zy.EMP_ID=gw.EMP_ID

option.source: @{select QTD , QTD_NM , QTD_CD from ibs.T9_YEAR_Q order by QTD }
option.label: QTD_NM

report.footer: 提示:本系统币种为本外币合计
